Method and data-quality dimension

Verification / assurance / validation Full-screen Entity Knowledge Graph

This page places all 4 categories and 323 companies identified under Verification / assurance / validation into one interactive knowledge-graph network.

The page supports drag-to-pan, wheel zoom, company search, node highlighting, and evidence back-links so stakeholders can inspect exactly which companies map to which categories inside the selected dimension.
